Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and multiple QA retesting cycles in Sprints 1-8 (as seen in JIRA and Metrics), there is a risk that QA costs will exceed budget, which could lead to financial overrun and reduced delivery efficiency.

Because of recurring environment and access dependency delays across sprints (JIRA: Blocked/Spike/Task, Metrics: elevated cycle time), there is a risk that integration and production support timelines will slip, which could lead to missed delivery milestones and SLA impact.

Because QA and DevOps resource utilization exceeded planned levels (Finance: QA 24% vs 20%, DevOps 14% vs 10%, over budget), there is a risk that sustained overload will reduce quality and increase defect leakage, which could lead to reliability degradation and further cost escalation.
